narrative:
Precinct Aurora 6-B (precinct in Portage County) has 869 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
